home.subtitle: Meditation exchange
home.dbError: Could not connect to the database. Check the DATABASE_URL variable.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in with Google to manage your meditations.

errors.Configuration: Auth.js configuration error. Check /api/auth/check-config and Vercel environment variables.
errors.AccessDenied: Access denied by Google. Add your email to Test users in Google Cloud Console.
errors.OAuthSignin: Could not start OAuth. Check GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.
errors.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create user. Check DATABASE_URL and migrations.
errors.Default: Sign in failed. Please try again.

meditationForm.publicHint: Visible to everyone on the «Public» tab

settings.subtitle: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface and meditation text language. Saved in the browser; translations are cached in the database.
settings.comingSoonDescription: Profile, notification, and privacy settings will appear in future versions.

history.subtitle: History
